text: Hello Maya, I finished the throttle cable adjustment. Please test the throttle response once you’re back aboard.
Thanks. I’ll run the engine this afternoon and confirm whether the idle is smooth and the throttle is responsive.
If you notice any lag or sticking at low RPM, let me know so I can adjust the cable tension again.
Will do. Also, should I keep the engine at cruising speed for a short run, or test only in idle?
Start with idle and low RPM, then if everything checks out, run at cruising speed for five minutes.
Understood. I’ll update you after the afternoon sea trial.
